name: Kiloton: Black Company
short_description: Run a mercenary company scrounging for scraps, unearth manmade horrors, and try not to die or worse -- get fired!
detailed_description:
Place your bets.

Hire, fire, and promote mercenaries ranging from basic GunBunny units to cyber-soldiers, combat streamers, and technological knights.

Play your cards.

Deploy and command your units to secure key resources while keeping the ammo and medical costs down.

Unearth horrors.

A horrific darkness lurks below the barren ashes of Grid 066, one that should never be found. You're here to find it.

Black Company.

You play as the CEO of a subsidiary company to a second-rate arms dealer, managing the business by entering warzones with your employees and coming out with loot in order to keep up with the ever-growing quota.

Hire more employees to handle your battles, purchase guns and cybernetics to turn them into killing machines, and when they're injured or can't keep up... well, it's your choice to keep them.
